products_categories.notes: ARK Electronics is a general EMS/PCBA contract manufacturer. No UXV-specific product lines or customers found. Industries: Industrial, Automotive, Power Electronics, Telecom, TV & Home Entertainment, Consumer Electronics.

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: ARK Electronics is a broad electronics contract manufacturer (EMS/PCBA) with no specifically UXV-oriented product line. No mention of drones, UAVs, or UAS anywhere on the site.

readiness.notes: ARK explicitly advertises high-volume 5-Sigma quality manufacturing and cost-effective solutions at scale.

unresolved_questions: No UXV-specific product line or drone customer evidence found in corpus; vendor appears to be a general electronics contract manufacturer.
Manufacturing HQ is China (Qingdao); could raise NDAA component-sourcing questions but site does not address this.

fetch_requests.reason: Would confirm whether defense, aerospace, or drone/UAS industries are served, which would directly affect drone_supply_chain_role and products_categories.

tagline: Contract manufacturer providing PCBA, EMS, and design engineering services; operates ArkX Labs joint venture producing Amazon pre-qualified far-field voice/audio modules (Cirrus Logic/NXP). Also offers cellular IoT product certification. NDAA and Blue UAS status unknown. Public evidence limited on defense/unmanned-systems experience or current program involvement.
